report.summary: Cycle-close sweep: 512 published pages healthy via dynamic routes, 2 new learn guides built and queued, 500 uncommitted file changes pending next deploy, 2 TS error files flagged (non-blocking), all 6 API routes cached but 4 lack fallback data and none use rate limiting.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: 512 published pages served via dynamic routes — no missing page.tsx gaps (102 apparent misses are handled by [slug] catch-all routes)
TypeScript check: 42 errors across 2 files — structured-data.examples.ts (docs, non-shipping) and crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped < in JSX)
Build config has ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do NOT block production builds
Lint config broken: next lint resolves to nonexistent /lint directory — needs fix
2 new pages built this cycle (staked-crypto-etfs-guide-2026, sec-cftc-mou-crypto-guide) — both compile clean, queued for Day 49

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes present: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (configurable)
Cache-Control headers with stale-while-revalidate properly set on all routes
FALLBACK GAP: Only 2/6 routes (prices, market-dominance) have hardcoded fallback data
RATE LIMIT GAP: 0/6 public data routes use the rate limiter — only health and cache-stats are protected
Health check route uses mock/random data rather than real service pings

sections.title: Deployment Status
items: Last deploy: commit cb65a9d (Day 42 — promote 5 pages)
500 uncommitted file changes: 465 untracked files (skills, docs) + 35 modified source files
Modified: 9 tool pages, 2 learn, 2 news, 2 airdrops, plus core components
next.config properly configured: standalone, 8GB, concurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true
No deploy this cycle — large uncommitted delta, commit + deploy overdue

sections.title: PM Wrap-Up
items: Shipped: 2 learn guides (staked ETFs + SEC-CFTC MOU) — researched, written, SEO-optimized, queued
Publish queue: 2 pages remaining (Day 49 batch)
Total published: 512 pages across all categories
Carry-over: commit+deploy 500 changes, fix crypto-index-funds JSX, add fallback data to 4 API routes, add rate limiting, fix lint config

sections.title: Blockers for Jefe
items: 500 uncommitted changes need commit + deploy — longest gap since Day 42
465 untracked .skill/.md files need decision: gitignore or commit
